name: Barley Basil Pilaf
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Minced Fresh Cilantro (Basil OR Plain Basil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a 1 quart saucepan over medium heat until hot, not smoking.
2. Add barley and cook for 5 minutes (or until browned), stirring constantly.
3. Add chicken broth and salt; bring to a boil.
4. Cover and reduce heat; simmer for 30 minutes (or until barley is tender and liquid is absorbed).
5. Remove from heat. Stir in basil, green onions, and nutmeg.
